\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Structure representing a single level in the stack. Has a pointer to the level above and below itself and a pointer to a generic blob of data associated with this level. 

\label{doc-variable-members}
\Hypertarget{structstack__level_doc-variable-members}
\doxysubsection{Field Documentation}
\Hypertarget{structstack__level_a2939391d23b373c7e3aa910900900bed}\index{stack\_level@{stack\_level}!above@{above}}
\index{above@{above}!stack\_level@{stack\_level}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{above}{above}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{structstack__level_a2939391d23b373c7e3aa910900900bed} 
struct \mbox{\hyperlink{structstack__level}{stack\+\_\+level}}\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} above}

Pointer to the level above this one. If NULL, then this level is the top of the stack. If above is non-\/\+NULL, this level {\itshape may} be the top, but all that can be guaranteed is that there are other allocated but potentially unused levels above this one. \Hypertarget{structstack__level_a5945c4462b1cedde633f17fac2dcb560}\index{stack\_level@{stack\_level}!below@{below}}
\index{below@{below}!stack\_level@{stack\_level}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{below}{below}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{structstack__level_a5945c4462b1cedde633f17fac2dcb560} 
struct \mbox{\hyperlink{structstack__level}{stack\+\_\+level}}\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} below}

Pointer to the level below this one. If NULL, then this level is the bottom. \Hypertarget{structstack__level_a735984d41155bc1032e09bece8f8d66d}\index{stack\_level@{stack\_level}!data@{data}}
\index{data@{data}!stack\_level@{stack\_level}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{data}{data}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily \label{structstack__level_a735984d41155bc1032e09bece8f8d66d} 
void\texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*} data}

Pointer to some data associated with this level. User is responsible for knowing what to cast the {\ttfamily void} {\ttfamily \texorpdfstring{$\ast$}{*}} pointer into.
